overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a cowboy character walking through a scenic mountain canyon. The character travels along a riverside trail before moving deeper into the canyon, with dramatic morning sunlight filtering through the rocky cliffs.

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the riverbank on a gravel path between rocky cliffs

entered.detail: flowing river with visible current running parallel to the path
steep rocky canyon wall with layered stone formations
tall rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation
tall evergreen tree growing along the cliff edge
rocky dirt trail running alongside the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gravel path beside a flowing river, flanked by steep rocky canyon walls. Tall pine trees dot the cliff edges as morning light illuminates the scene.

events.description: path curves away from the river into the open canyon interior
dramatic sun rays become visible streaming through the canyon mist

agents.ego_description: continuing up the trail into the canyon interior, moving away from the water

entered.detail: dramatic beams of morning sunlight filtering down through the canyon

segments.scene_description: The trail curves away from the river into a wider canyon area where dramatic sun rays stream down through the morning mist. The path becomes grassy and more open as the character moves deeper into the canyon.

events.description: entering narrower shaded section of the canyon with steeper walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon passage with cliffs rising on both sides, moving into shadow

entered.detail: large rock formation along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower section of the canyon where the walls rise steeply on both sides, creating deeper shadows. The path becomes rockier as it winds through the enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverside trail that gradually opens into a wide, mist-filled canyon. It begins with the character walking along a gravel path beside a flowing river, flanked by steep rocky walls and pine trees clinging to the cliff edges. As the trail curves away from the water, the environment shifts from the narrow riverbank into a more expansive canyon area. The scene then expands as the path becomes grassy and open, while dramatic morning sun rays begin to stream down through a layer of lingering mist. The camera continues to follow the character deeper into the canyon, moving from the structured river trail into the luminous, open wilderness.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from an open trail into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow canyon. It begins with the character entering a tightening corridor where the surrounding rock walls rise steeply on both sides. As the camera pushes forward, the environment shifts from open vistas to a space dominated by deep, encroaching shadows. The scene then evolves as the path becomes increasingly rocky, winding further into the enclosed passage.
